name: AI Content Creator Agent
description: VSCode agent config for the CyberShield AI Content Creator project
customInstructions: You are assisting with a Python automation project that creates cybersecurity content for CyberShield Inc. The codebase lives in src/. The knowledge bases are in knowledge_base/primary/ and knowledge_base/secondary/ as markdown files. Always preserve brand voice rules from knowledge_base/primary/brand_guidelines.md when editing prompt templates. When modifying content_pipeline.py, maintain the five-stage structure: Document → Monitor → Brief → Publish → Iterate.

inputs.default: Why alert fatigue is a leadership problem

agentWorkflow.preferredApproach: When asked to generate content: (1) check kb-status first, (2) run monitor if needed, (3) run the pipeline with appropriate template
fileModificationRules: Never modify .env directly — use os.getenv() patterns
When adding new templates, register them in TEMPLATE_REGISTRY in prompt_templates.py
New knowledge base docs must be .md files in knowledge_base/primary/ or secondary/
Run kb-status after adding new documents to verify ingestion
agentWorkflow.testingApproach: Test each stage independently before running the full pipeline. Use --skip-monitor and --no-review flags during development.

devNotes.apiKeys: Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env file. Never commit .env.
devNotes.model: Default is claude-opus-4-5. Override with LLM_MODEL env var.
devNotes.outputDir: All generated content saves to output/ with timestamps.
devNotes.knowledgeBaseUpdates: Add new .md files to knowledge_base/ directories. DocumentProcessor auto-discovers them on next run.
